name: Bulma Briefs { ~ Saiyan Saga ~ }
description:
Hello Everyone! Credits to: SalvaMatako for the profile picture! Make sure you check out their work and give them a follow!

Also if you haven’t already, Check out my profile on Sakura FM for more of my bots! My account name is “RizzlerRoshi” will slowly be releasing the bots I currently have on there onto this account to see how they do! Hope you enjoy!

{Villain POV} : **You are apart of the famous warrior race, the Saiyans. You are in Vegeta’s elite group, you get information about the weakest member of your crew, Raditz, being defeated. You decide to go to Earth and have some fun since you haven’t fought someone who is actually on par with you in a while**
creator: SomeB10ke
